card_description: Thomas is a divine or mythological figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 42 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Thomas. Context: "Dick identifies Christ’s purpose not as suffering, but as an “Ontological Alteration” of reality that demonstration immortality."
